tasks.title: Audit current icon usage and existing icon libraries in website and extension
tasks.description: Inspect all current icon usage across website and browser extension source code. Identify all icon libraries currently used and note inconsistencies, duplicates, or ugly icons. Produce a report listing all icon usages and libraries found.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete list of all icon usages and icon libraries in website and extension
Identification of inconsistencies or issues with current icons
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive audit report of current icon usage and libraries, highlighting inconsistencies and issues

outputPlan.description: Icon usage and library audit report for website and extension

metadata.inputContext: Project source code for website and extension UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for consistent icon library selection and replacement

tasks.title: Select and integrate main icon library phosphor-react or lucide-react
tasks.description: Based on icon audit, choose one main icon library (phosphor-react or lucide-react) that fits the flat, colorful, modern education app style. Integrate the chosen icon library into the project, including website and extension. Create or update a shared icon mapping file (e.g., src/icons/IconMap.ts) with semantic icon names for all common icons used across the app.
acceptanceCriteria: One main icon library selected and integrated in website and extension
Shared icon mapping file created or updated with semantic icon names
No multiple icon libraries remain in use
tasks.expectedResult: Project uses a single consistent icon library with semantic icon mapping for all icons

outputPlan.description: Shared icon mapping file with semantic icon names
Updated icon imports and usage to use the selected icon library and mapping
Updated icon imports and usage in extension popup components

metadata.inputContext: Icon audit report and project source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes consistent, modern icon system across website and extension

tasks.title: Create or improve flat colorful theme tokens for colors, border radius, spacing, typography
tasks.description: Design and implement a comprehensive theme token system for the project that includes semantic color tokens for IELTS skills and UI states, consistent border radius tokens, spacing tokens, and typography tokens. Refactor existing theme or create new theme files (e.g., src/theme/colors.ts, src/theme/radius.ts, src/theme/spacing.ts, src/theme/typography.ts). Ensure no hard-coded colors, radii, or spacing remain in components or pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Theme tokens cover all required colors, radii, spacing, typography
No random hard-coded colors, radii, or spacing remain in updated files
Theme tokens are used consistently in components
tasks.expectedResult: A clean, reusable, and consistent theme token system implemented and applied

outputPlan.description: Semantic color tokens including IELTS skill colors and UI states
Spacing tokens for margins and paddings
Typography tokens for font sizes and weights
Refactor components to use theme tokens instead of hard-coded styles
Refactor extension components to use theme tokens

metadata.inputContext: Project styling system and design requirements
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for consistent, colorful, and modern UI styling

tasks.title: Audit and document all UX/UI bugs across website and extension
tasks.description: Perform a thorough audit of all UX/UI bugs listed in the prompt across all website pages and extension screens. Document each bug with location, description, and severity. Include layout issues, icon misalignments, responsiveness problems, missing states, accessibility issues, and inconsistent styles.
acceptanceCriteria: Comprehensive UX/UI bug list covering website and extension
Bugs categorized by type and severity
tasks.expectedResult: Detailed UX/UI bug audit report covering all required areas

outputPlan.description: Comprehensive UX/UI bug audit report for website and extension

metadata.inputContext: Project UI source code and design requirements
evidence: UX/UI bug audit report file exists
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear list of UX/UI issues to fix for improved user experience

tasks.title: Update reusable UI components to flat colorful rounded style using theme tokens and icon mapping
tasks.description: Refactor or create reusable components including Button, IconButton, Card, FeatureCard, SkillCard, StudyTaskCard, ProgressCard, VocabularyCard, AITutorCard, Badge, Input, SearchInput, Select, Tabs, Modal, Drawer, Toast, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton, ErrorState, BottomNavigation, ExtensionPopupCard, SelectedTextActionMenu, SyncStatusBadge. Apply flat design with bright controlled colors, large border radius, consistent spacing, theme typography, and mapped icons. Remove any hard-coded styles and ensure mobile-first responsiveness.
acceptanceCriteria: All listed reusable components updated to new flat colorful rounded style
Components use theme tokens and icon mapping consistently
Components are responsive and accessible
No hard-coded colors, radii, or spacing remain
tasks.expectedResult: Reusable UI components fully updated with new design system and ready for use in pages

outputPlan.description: Updated Button component with flat colorful rounded style

metadata.inputContext: Theme tokens, icon mapping, UX/UI bug audit
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides consistent, reusable UI components for the redesigned app

tasks.description: Refactor the Dashboard page to use the updated reusable components and theme tokens. Ensure clear visual hierarchy, friendly spacing, and mobile-first responsiveness.

Dashboard layout is clean, colorful, and mobile-friendly
All dashboard features are present and visually clear

tasks.title: Improve mobile layout and responsiveness across website and extension
tasks.description: Audit and fix mobile layout issues on all pages and extension popup. Touch targets are large and accessible
Mobile UI feels like a modern app, not squeezed desktop site

tasks.title: Remove old inconsistent icons and unused icon imports from codebase
tasks.description: After icon library consolidation and UI updates, remove all old icon imports and unused icon components from website and extension source code. Clean up any dead code related to previous icon usage to keep codebase clean and maintainable.

tasks.title: Audit changed files for hard-coded design values and refactor to use theme tokens
tasks.description: Review all files changed in previous tasks for any remaining hard-coded colors, spacing, border radius, font sizes, shadows, or icon colors. Refactor these to use the shared theme tokens consistently. Ensure no random hard-coded design values remain in the updated UI code.
acceptanceCriteria: No hard-coded design values remain in changed files
All design values use theme tokens

tasks.title: Test all updated UI and core user flows for functionality and UX quality
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of all updated UI components, pages, and extension screens. Verify navigation, button actions, form submissions, AI Tutor functionality, study plan data display, vocabulary actions, extension popup and selected-text menu behavior, auto-highlight safety, and settings saving. Confirm no regressions or UX/UI bugs remain. Test on multiple screen sizes including mobile small, mobile large, tablet, laptop, desktop, and extension popup size. Verify accessibility features and focus states.
acceptanceCriteria: All core user flows work correctly without regressions
No UX/UI bugs remain
Responsive layouts work on all tested screen sizes
Accessibility features are present and functional
tasks.expectedResult: All tests pass and manual UX checks confirm improved UI/UX quality

metadata.inputContext: All updated UI code and components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms the UI/UX redesign is stable, usable, and production-ready

tasks.title: Generate final report summarizing icon library, theme tokens, components, pages, extension UI, UX/UI bugs, accessibility, and tests
tasks.description: Compile a comprehensive final report documenting the selected icon library, icons replaced, theme tokens added or updated, components updated, pages updated, extension UI updated, UX/UI bugs found and fixed, responsive bugs fixed, accessibility improvements, hard-coded styles removed, tests performed, and any remaining issues. Provide this report as docs/final-ui-ux-redesign-report.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Final report covers all required topics comprehensively
